predicates.name: is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: estate_has_opened
predicates.description: The estate of the deceased person has opened.

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_residence
predicates.description: The property served as the family principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: is_household_effects_in
predicates.description: The asset consists of household effects present in the given immovable property.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The immovable property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The immovable property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: household_effects_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The household effects present in the immovable property are the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

predicates.name: household_effects_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The household effects present in the immovable property are the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_family_residence
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the immovable property that served as the family principal residence.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the household effects present in the family principal residence.

predicates.name: exercises_usufruct_of_family_residence
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the usufruct of the immovable property that served as the family principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.

predicates.name: exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the usufruct of the household effects present in the family principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.

predicates.name: property_subject_to_any_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The immovable property is subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or article 4.25.

predicates.name: household_effects_subject_to_any_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The household effects in the property are subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or article 4.25.
